claims.text: DeepSeek raised more than RMB 50 billion ($7.4B) in its first external funding round at a post-money valuation exceeding $50 billion
Most external investors invest into a limited partnership managed by CEO Liang Wenfeng, receiving no voting rights and subject to a 5-year lock-up
China's National Artificial Intelligence Industry Investment Fund is the sole exception, investing directly into DeepSeek with full voting rights and no lock-up
Liang Wenfeng personally committed approximately RMB 20 billion ($3B) of his own capital
Tencent invested ~RMB 10B, CATL ~RMB 5B, JD.com, NetEase, and IDG Capital each ~RMB 3B
The LP structure means next cap-table event is 2031
DeepSeek V4 Flash pricing at $0.14/M input is 71x cheaper than Claude Fable 5
DeepSeek processes ~6 trillion tokens/week vs GPT-5.5 at 470B — 13x volume advantage
DeepSeek's estimated ARR is ~$120M, implying ~430x multiple
Anthropic valuation rose from $61.5B to ~$965B; revenue run-rate $47B
Electricity cost advantage at 0.3 RMB/kWh vs $0.08-0.15/kWh in US
Nvidia China share collapsed from 90%+ to ~55%
Big Fund Phase III registered capital RMB 344B ($47.5B)
Manus AI acquisition was unwound by NDRC with founder exit bans
